name: Slime Dunk!
author: Poki
description: Slime Dunk! is a quirky basketball game that puts a splashy twist on shooting hoops! Use a water-shooting gun to push and guide the ball through the air, adjusting its direction with powerful streams to sink the perfect dunk. Shoot fast, aim smart, and blast your way through fun levels while unlocking cool new worlds. Ready to make a splash and dunk like never before? How to play Slime Dunk!? Click or tap to shoot. Who created Slime Dunk!? Slime Dunk! is created by Ventorous. Play their other game on Poki: Catpad , Water Polo Ragdoll , Cubies and Zooplop ! How can I play Slime Dunk! for free? You can play Slime Dunk! for free on Poki. Can I play Slime Dunk! on mobile devices and desktop? Slime Dunk! can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
